rows.label: qev060601_MSG0001
rows.name: Hello! Are you not a Zaruboggan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060601_SEL0011
rows.name: State that you are not a Zaruboggan.

rows.label: qev060601_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060601_SEL0021
rows.name: Mention that you might possibly be a Zaruboggan.

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0002
rows.name:
You are not a Zaruboggan...
I see, I will learn...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0003
rows.name:
I think you seem like
a very good person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0004
rows.name:
You are a Zaruboggan? I
see, I will learn...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0005
rows.name:
I sense a very evil,
mischievous spirit from you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0006
rows.name:
Do you understand?
Orleron is Zaruboggan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0007
rows.name:
So I must revoltant and
fulfill my mission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0008
rows.name:
To fulfill my mission,
I need a new Gorkwa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0009
rows.name:
But, there are no Gorkwas anywhere... The
staff to revoltant, where is a Gorkwa?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060601_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask what exactly a Gorkwa is.

rows.label: qev060601_JNK0060
rows.name: Answer

rows.label: qev060601_SEL0061
rows.name: Answer that if it's a staff, the Zaruboggan have them.

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0010
rows.name:
The Zaruboggan use the Gorkwa to
fulfill their great mission! But
there is no new Gorkwa here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0011
rows.name:
That is not Orleron's!
So I need a new Gorkwa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Will you all bring a new Gorkwa for
me? Will you make Orleron a grown-up?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0013
rows.name:
When Orleron becomes a grown-up, I will
energetically fulfill my mission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Orleron will wait! While waiting,
I will do grown-up studies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0015
rows.name:
Where should Orleron do grown-up
studies? Please, you tell me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_JNK0030
rows.name: NLA

rows.label: qev060601_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell him to study together with Earthlings in NLA.

rows.label: qev060601_JNK0040
rows.name: Ma-non Spaceship

rows.label: qev060601_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell him to study together with the Zaruboggan inside the spaceship.

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0016
rows.name:
I see, I will learn... Orleron
will do grown-up studies
together with Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0017
rows.name:
I see, I will learn... Orleron
will do grown-up studies
together with the Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0018
rows.name:
Please go get a Gorkwa. While you
do, Orleron will become a grown-up
capable of fulfilling his mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0021
rows.name:
So, I'll be doing my grown-up
studies in Nyuu Ro-sangerusu while
waiting for you to get a Gorkwa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0022
rows.name:
Orleron doesn't know about the Gorkwa
either. But I know that it is necessary![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0023
rows.name:
If I have a Gorkwa, I can
fulfill my great mission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060601_MSG0024
rows.name:
So, I'll be doing my grown-up studies
together with the Zaruboggan while
waiting for you to get a Gorkwa![ST:wait ]
